Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ALLEN AMARKARIAN, Esq. of Quill and Arrow (tel:310-933-4271) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. KEVIN TULLY, Esq. of Law Offices of Kevin J. Tully (tel:650-377-0708) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SERGIO CORONA, LUZ MARTINEZ's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judge pro tem's report and recommendations is adopted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling an attaches a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Andrew Jung, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 e-service@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, SERGIO A. CORONA AND LUZ A. MARTINEZ
KEVIN J. TULLY, ESQ. LAW OFFICES OF KEVIN J. TULLY (650) 377-0708 kevin@tullylaw.net Attorneys for Defendants FORD MOTOR COMPANY

Counsel for Defendant did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem hearing today's motion.

Hearing is held.ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows

PLAINTIFF SERGIO CORONA, LUZ MARTINEZ'S Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents is continued to February 15, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 on shortened time due to scheduling conflicts as to both plaintiff and Defendant's counsels. Counsel for defendant General Motors did not stipualate to the Judge Pro Tem. Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
